articles.description: Jeremy Doku said last month that he needed to add more goals to his game to be considered one of the best wingers in the world, so is he part of that conversation now?
articles.title: Man City 3-0 Brentford: Is Jeremy Doku keeping his side in title race?

articles.description: More boos at Anfield highlight why Liverpool must change their style during a seismic summer for Arne Slot.
articles.title: Liverpool still lack identity and Arne Slot needs to fix that

articles.description: Daniel Dubois survives two knockdowns to dethrone Fabio Wardley in the 11th round of a thrilling heavyweight classic and become a two-time world champion.
articles.title: Wardley vs Dubois: Londoner captures WBO world title in an all-time classic heavyweight fight

articles.description: Manchester United have failed to win any of the four Premier League games Casemiro has failed to start this season, leaving Michael Carrick to ponder how to replace him when he leaves this summer.
articles.title: Sunderland 0-0 Man Utd: Task of replacing Casemiro will not be easy for United

articles.description: Barcelona host Real Madrid in the second Clasico of the season, bidding to clinch a second consecutive La Liga title. They face a team in crisis, in a rivalry where there is no mercy.
articles.title: El Clasico: How can crisis-hit Real Madrid stop Barcelona clinching La Liga title?

articles.description: Michael Olise scores a sublime curling strike, while Harry Kane misses a penalty, as Bayern Munich claim a narrow Bundesliga victory to pile the pressure on relegation-threatened Wolfsburg.
articles.title: Wolfsburg 0-1 Bayern Munich: Michael Olise stunner gives champions narrow win

articles.description: The Iranian Football Federation (FFIRI) has presented Fifa with 10 conditions for participation at the World Cup in the US, Mexico and Canada.
articles.title: Iran demands guarantees for World Cup participation

articles.description: As the Premier League season nears its conclusion, who are favourites to secure a place in Europe next season, and how many English teams could qualify?
articles.title: Race for Europe: How it stands for Premier League game hopefuls and remaining games

articles.description: Wolves set to agree deal to sell Joao Gomes to Atletico Madrid, PSG close to new Luis Enrique contract, and Liverpool are keen on Emi Martinez.
articles.title: Football gossip: Luis Enrique, Martinez, Nwaneri, Gomes, Gvardiol, Openda

articles.description: Every Hearts game is a pulse-quickening drama now as title race takes another twist, writes Tom English.
articles.title: Fans drunk on drama as intoxicating title race takes another twist
